customRules.rule: SwiftUI state changes intended to animate must occur inside withAnimation or have an applicable implicit animation; .transition insertions and removals must receive an animation transaction. Flag changes that add a transition or animation modifier without a driving transaction.

Do not silently drop accessibility labels, hints, traits, identifiers, or usable tap targets when refactoring a view. Compare the old and new implementations and flag any removed accessibility affordance.

Async work in views and view models must handle Task cancellation and stale results: flag unguarded awaits that mutate state after the owning view or task is gone, and missing cancellation on disappear or repeated invocation.
